Home.title: Fresh vegetables and fruits from local farmers

content: We create a place where tradition meets modernity – straight from the field to your home or business.

Our goal is to promote the best of what Polish soil has to offer. That's why we work with local farmers and producers who, like us, prioritize quality, freshness, and natural farming methods. This means you'll find products in our online store that capture the flavor of a true garden.

Retail.title: RETAIL AND WHOLESALE
Retail.content: Would you like to collaborate or order our products? Contact us—we'll be happy to prepare an offer tailored to your needs.

sections.heading: 1. Personal Data Administrator
sections.content: The administrator of your personal data is Fabryka Warzyw. Address: ul. Belwederska 42, 99-100 Łęczyca, Tax ID (NIP): 5070080610, E-mail: kontakt@fabrykawarzyw.pl

sections.heading: 2. What data do we collect?
sections.content: On our business showcase website, we only process data that you provide voluntarily via e-mail contact or the contact form. This usually includes: name, e-mail address, and the content of your message.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose and basis for data processing
sections.content: We process your data solely for the purpose of conducting correspondence and responding to your inquiries. The legal basis for processing is the administrator's legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) of the GDPR), consisting of building relationships with customers and providing information about our activities.

sections.heading: 4. Data sharing
sections.content: Your data is safe and is not shared with third parties for marketing purposes. Access to your data may only be granted to entities providing technical services to us (e.g., website hosting providers), solely to the extent necessary for the proper functioning of the site.

sections.heading: 5. Data retention period
sections.content: Your data will be stored for the time necessary to respond to your message and conclude the correspondence. After this time, the data will be deleted unless legal regulations require longer storage.

sections.heading: 6. User rights
sections.content: You have the right to: access your data and receive a copy of it, rectify your data, request the deletion of data ("the right to be forgotten"), restrict data processing, object to processing, and lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority (President of the Office for Personal Data Protection).

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
sections.content: Our website may use cookies to ensure its proper operation and to maintain visit statistics. By using our site, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with your browser settings. You can change these settings in your web browser at any time.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.content: For matters related to personal data protection or to exercise your rights, please contact us at the e-mail address: kontakt@fabrykawarzyw.pl.
